PowerShell($body = '{"timestamp":"2026-06-13T00:00:00Z","name":"Phone Test","email":"phonetest@example.com","phone":"+919876543210","business":"","message":"checking phone format"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://script.google.com/macros/s/AKfycbx5Qhy1fX6gxbq-OBNOj_rBqqEfhR-IJsLq3SXdLSIhD7296boFdW75jAPebktf9Kbs/exec" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -UseBasicParsing; $r.StatusCode; $r.Content } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; $resp.StatusCode.value__; $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $reader.ReadToEnd\(\) })
